items.title: Transfer rumors, news: PSG battle Premier League trio for Newcastle youngster
items.summary: Newcastle United midfielder Lewis Miley has received attention ahead of the summer, with Paris Saint-Germain, Manchester United, Arsenal and Chelsea. Transfer Talk has the latest.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Jack Leaning 120* seals win to ignite Sussex Championship hopes
